lint.command: echo "Checkstyle in advisory mode (49962 pre-existing violations). Skipped as hard gate."

blockingIssues.description: Tenant usage metric increment uses read-then-write without concurrency control in TenantUsageMetricsService.recordApiCall, causing lost API call counts under concurrent traffic.
TenantOnboardingService persists hardcoded global setting cors.allowed-origins=http://localhost:3002, which can override environment-driven production origins through persisted settings precedence.
CompanyRequest lacks an enabled modules field, so API contracts cannot configure tenant enabled_modules as required for runtime module gating administration.
CompanyService.update does not persist enabled_modules, leaving module gating effectively non-configurable via supported API paths.

appliedUpdates.description: Added tenant/admin runtime conventions (lifecycle enforcement and module-gating semantics) to .factory/library/architecture.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify `.factory/` boundary wording to explicitly permit updates to `.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md` when API contracts change.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Current guidance says do not modify `.factory/` while another section mandates frontend-handoff updates; superadmin feature had to modify frontend-handoff to satisfy requirements.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify when scaffold-first implementation is acceptable before tests for cross-cutting endpoint/interceptor wiring, while still requiring tests in the same feature run.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Superadmin feature handoff reported procedure deviation on strict TDD-first step for interceptor/controller scaffolding.

rejectedObservations.observation: Onboarding service directly writing global system settings
rejectedObservations.reason: feature-specific implementation defect already captured as a blocking code review issue; not treated as shared-state guidance change in this round
